name: Brink POS Restaurant Management API
what_it_does: Brink POS (PAR Technology) cloud-based restaurant management REST API for enterprise quick-service and fast-casual restaurant chain operations. Enables AI agents to manage menu configuration and price update for multi-location restaurant menu management automation, handle order processing and transaction data for restaurant order workflow automation, access store-level sales reporting and real-time performance for restaurant analytics automation, retrieve menu item modifier and combo meal management for complex order configuration automation, manage loyalty program integration and customer recognition for restaurant guest engagement automation, handle kitchen display system (KDS) and order routing for restaurant kitchen workflow automation, access franchise and multi-unit reporting for restaurant chain performance automation, retrieve digital ordering and drive-through integration for omnichannel restaurant automation, manage daypart menu and limited-time offer activation for restaurant marketing automation, and integrate Brink with delivery platforms, accounting, payroll, and labor management for enterprise restaurant technology stack.
use_cases: Updating menus from chain-wide management automation agents
Reporting sales from enterprise restaurant analytics agents
Integrating loyalty from guest engagement automation agents
Activating LTOs from restaurant marketing agents
not_for: Fine dining and full-service table management
Single-location independent restaurant without enterprise needs
best_when: A quick-service restaurant (QSR) chain, fast-casual franchise, or enterprise restaurant group wanting AI agents to automate multi-location menu management, sales reporting, loyalty integration, and kitchen operations within Brink POS as the enterprise cloud POS platform.
avoid_when: FRANCHISE TERRITORY MENU PRICE VARIATION: Automated menu price update via Brink must apply franchise agreement regional price variation; chain-wide price update that overwrites franchise-specific pricing violates franchise agreement and creates local pricing compliance issue. DIGITAL ORDERING MENU SYNC ACCURACY: Automated menu management via Brink must synchronize in-store and digital ordering channel menus; automated in-store menu update without corresponding digital/mobile ordering update creates menu inconsistency and order rejection for digital channel customers. PAR TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM ECOSYSTEM INTEGRATION: Brink POS is PAR Technology flagship product alongside PAR Punchh loyalty and PAR Data Central; automated workflows spanning POS, loyalty, and analytics benefit from PAR unified platform; verify PAR Data Central and Punchh API integration scope for full-stack restaurant automation.

auth.notes: Brink POS uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. New Hartford, New York HQ (PAR Technology). PAR Technology NYSE: PAR. Brink POS founded 2012 (Dallas). Acquired by PAR Technology 2014. 100,000+ restaurant locations globally. Enterprise QSR and fast-casual focus: Burger King, Taco Bell, Dairy Queen, Hardee's, Carl's Jr., Arby's, Sonic Drive-In, Checkers/Rally's clients. Cloud-native POS with offline capability. PAR Data Central analytics. PAR Punchh loyalty. Competes with Oracle MICROS, NCR, and Toast for enterprise restaurant POS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise subscription per restaurant location
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per location; enterprise pricing for 100+ unit chains; implementation and integration fees; PAR suite bundling
pricing.notes: New Hartford NY (PAR Technology). NYSE: PAR. Annual subscription per location. Enterprise chain pricing. PAR Data Central and Punchh suite pricing. Implementation project fees.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; transaction and menu queries throttled; webhooks for order and menu events

known_agent_gotchas: MULTI-UNIT MENU DEPLOYMENT STAGING: Automated menu change deployment via Brink for enterprise chains must implement staged rollout with test store validation before chain-wide deployment; automated chain-wide menu push without test store validation creates chain-wide menu errors at scale

FRANCHISE PRICE VARIATION CONFIGURATION: Automated menu price updates must preserve franchise-level and market-level price overrides; chain-wide price push that overwrites franchise agreement pricing creates franchise relationship and compliance issues; implement price override hierarchy in menu management automation

OFFLINE MODE TRANSACTION RECONCILIATION: Brink cloud POS has offline capability for network outage resilience; automated transaction reporting must reconcile offline transactions synced after connectivity restore; real-time transaction reporting during outage may miss offline transactions

DAYPART MENU ACTIVATION TIMING: Automated limited-time offer and daypart menu activation via Brink must apply restaurant local time zone for activation timing; chain-wide LTO activation using server UTC time without local time zone conversion creates daypart menu inconsistency across time zones

PAR PUNCHH LOYALTY INTEGRATION SCOPE: Brink POS integrates with PAR Punchh loyalty platform; automated loyalty point award and redemption at POS requires Punchh API integration in addition to Brink POS API; loyalty automation requires managing both Brink POS and PAR Punchh API surfaces

DIGITAL ORDERING OMNICHANNEL MENU SYNC: Automated menu management via Brink must synchronize web, app, kiosk, and third-party delivery menus simultaneously; Brink in-store menu update without digital menu sync creates omnichannel menu inconsistency for digital-heavy QSR operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise restaurant POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/CA. Payment card and restaurant transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise restaurant POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. Global. Payment and restaurant transaction data.
